caption:
Why does your website score 38 on PageSpeed while bienzoli sites score 95+?

It's not luck. It's Next.js — the same framework used by TikTok, Notion, and Twitch.

Most agencies in Mauritius ship WordPress. Fast themes with heavy plugins that bloat your page to 4MB and take 8 seconds to load on mobile.

We build from scratch. No plugins, no bloat, just clean code that loads in under 1 second.

Faster site = better Google ranking = more customers finding you. 📈

→ bienzoli.com
